summary: Adjusted the opening so it inherits chapter 15's unanswered phone pressure and blood-marked committee packet while breaking the shared static place-description scaffold visible at the start of chapter 17. The closing already handed off cleanly through Marisol's preserved copy of the archive, so no exit rewrite was added.
edits: Reframed the first paragraph around Leela still not checking her phone, linking the chapter entry directly to the prior chapter's final buzzes.
Kept the laundromat beat intact while changing the opening construction so it no longer mirrors chapter 17's setting-first entry.
Carried Mohit's blood-marked packet into the laundromat scene to preserve immediate aftermath continuity from chapter 15.
